title: 💻 AI/ML Software Engineer (Remote - Ghana)
description:
**Company:** 

  Anablock.com
 




**Location:** 

  Remote (Ghana \\- Accra or anywhere in Ghana)
 




**Employment Type:** 

  Full\\-time Contract
 




  





**About Us** 




 We're a US\\-based software company with a growing team in Uganda (currently 2 developers in Kampala). We're looking for talented backend engineers to join our team and help build scalable, high\\-performance systems.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Build autonomous AI agents that automate business processes (lead qualification, document processing, customer support, sales workflows)
* Design and implement multi\\-agent systems using LangChain, LlamaIndex, or custom frameworks with tool integration and orchestration
* Develop agent\\-powered web applications with React/Vue frontends and Node.js/Python backends
* Integrate AI agents with business systems (CRMs, email, databases, APIs) to create end\\-to\\-end automation workflows
* Optimize agent performance, cost, and reliability through prompt engineering, caching strategies, and error handling
* Collaborate with our distributed team via Slack and GitHub, participate in code reviews, and contribute to agent architecture decisions



  





**Required Skills** 



* **Backend:** 
  Node.js, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript
* **Frameworks:** 
  Express, Django, Flask, Next.js
* **Database:** 
  PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB (schema design, optimization)
* **API Design:** 
  RESTful principles, authentication (JWT, OAuth)
* **Version Control:** 
  Git/GitHub workflows
* **English:** 
  Clear communication for daily standups and documentation
* **Version Control** 
 : Git/GitHub workflows
* **AI/ML Expertise:** 
  Hands\\-on experience with machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit\\-learn, Keras) or AI application development
* **AI/ML Applications:** 
  Experience building or integrating:
* **LLM\\-powered applications** 
 (chatbots, content generation, semantic search)
* Recommendation systems or predictive models
* Computer vision or NLP solutions
* AI agent systems or autonomous workflows
* **AI Infrastructure:** 
  Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, Chroma, Weaviate), embeddings, prompt engineering, or fine\\-tuning models



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
* Docker and containerization
* Redis, RabbitMQ, or message queues
* GraphQL experience
* Previous work with distributed teams
* Contributions to open\\-source projects



  





**What We Offer** 




 ✅ 
 **USD salary** 
  paid monthly (UGX 65M/year median \\= $8\\.40/hr; we're competitive)
 



 ✅ 
 **Join existing Uganda team** 
  — 2 developers already in Kampala for mentorship
 



 ✅ 
 **Flexible schedule** 
  — async\\-first culture
 



 ✅ 
 **Annual raises** 
  based on performance
 



 ✅ 
 **Learning opportunities** 
  — courses, certifications, conference tickets
 



 ✅ 
 **Career progression** 
  — senior roles at $12\\-15/hr within 2\\-3 years
 



 ✅ 
 **Stable long\\-term work** 
  — we're building a team, not a project
 



  





**Compensation Details** 



* **Starting rate:** 
  $6\\-8/hr (UGX \\~3\\.9M\\-5\\.2M/month)
* **Monthly hours:** 
  160 hours
* **Monthly income:** 
  $960\\-1,280 USD (UGX \\~6\\.2M\\-8\\.3M)
* **Payment:** 
  Monthly via Payoneer, Wise, or local bank transfer
* **Comparison:** 
  Market median is UGX 5\\.4M/month; we're above average for juniors

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full-Stack)
company: GoSats - The simplest onramp to Digital Assets in India
description:
GoSats is India's simplest onramp to digital assets. We help lakhs of Indians convert their everyday spending into Bitcoin and Gold \\- building long\\-term wealth through a habit they already have: spending money. Backed by Konvoy, Y Combinator, Accel, and others, we recently closed our $5M Series A and are scaling rapidly toward becoming the default wealth\\-building tool for mainstream India.
   

  

**About the Role:** 
 You will spend your mornings architecting our next payment flow with AI as your co\\-pilot, and your afternoons shipping production code that handles real money for real Indians. You will need to build systems that scale to millions of transactions a day \\- card processing, wallet ledgering, KYC orchestration, settlement engines, and bank integrations.
   

  

 We use AI ruthlessly. 70%\\+ of our code is AI\\-generated and human\\-reviewed for architecture, edge cases, and security. If you still write boilerplate by hand, this role will frustrate you. If you treat Cursor and Claude Code as your daily shipping partners, you will love this team.
   

  

**What You Will Own**
* Own end\\-to\\-end ownership of features from API design to production deployment \\- no swim lanes
* Own the architecture of our settlement and ledger systems, ensuring zero financial discrepancies as transaction volumes 10x
* Own code quality standards across the engineering team and lead architecture reviews
* Own scaling our backend to 10M users without rewriting core systems


**Show Us Evidence Of Building**
* A production system you architected that handled 1M\\+ users (link, GitHub, or company)
* Something you shipped that involved complex financial ledgering, payments, or asset movement
* Daily usage of AI coding tools \\- share a side project you vibe\\-coded recently
* Strong proficiency in Node.js / Python , React Native and AWS Services


**Bonus Points For**
* Built or scaled a payment system, wallet, or card product
* Experience with PCI\\-DSS, RBI PPI guidelines, or regulated fintech systems
* Open source contributions


**First 90 Days**
* Day 30: You will have audited our existing backend architecture, identified the top 3 scaling bottlenecks, and shipped your first production fix
* Day 60: You will have overseen the migration of our settlement ledger to handle 10x current volume and shipped a real\\-time reward notification system for card swipes
* Day 90: You will own a critical service in our stack and have set up automated AI\\-assisted code review workflows for the entire engineering team

title: Ai Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 CambrianEdge.ai is at the forefront of AI\\-native marketing operations, pioneering the development of human\\-centered, agentic AI systems designed to revolutionize how businesses create content, automate workflows, and scale their operations. Our mission is to build production\\-grade AI solutions that deliver real\\-world impact, moving beyond theoretical research to practical, scalable applications. We focus on integrating the latest advancements in AI and machine learning into robust platforms that thousands of users depend on daily. CambrianEdge.ai is committed to fostering innovation, collaboration, and excellence in AI engineering, striving to shape the future of intelligent automation in the marketing and business landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented and experienced AI Software Engineer to join our dynamic team remotely. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and deploying multi\\-agent systems, retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) architectures, and integrating large language models (LLMs) into scalable production environments. Your work will directly impact our cutting\\-edge platforms, enabling autonomous workflows that reason, plan, and execute tasks with minimal human intervention. You will collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to translate complex user needs into practical AI solutions, ensuring high performance, reliability, and cost\\-efficiency. This is an exceptional opportunity for someone passionate about pushing the boundaries of AI technology and making tangible industry impact through innovative engineering.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in software engineering, AI, and machine learning, with a proven track record of building production systems. You should have at least 4\\+ years of experience in developing scalable software solutions, with deep expertise in frameworks such as LangChain, Mastra, or LlamaIndex. Proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js is essential, along with a solid understanding of API design and frontend integration. Experience with retrieval systems, embeddings, vector databases, and semantic search is highly desirable. Familiarity with multi\\-agent workflows, prompt engineering, and context management in LLMs is critical. Additionally, you should demonstrate excellent problem\\-solving skills, effective communication, and a proactive mindset to navigate complex technical challenges. Bonus points for experience with Next.js, open\\-source AI contributions, fine\\-tuning models, or knowledge in NLP and AI research.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As an AI Software Engineer at CambrianEdge.ai, your core responsibilities will include designing and deploying agentic workflows capable of autonomous reasoning, planning, and execution. You will architect and optimize RAG systems, building retrieval pipelines that surface relevant context efficiently and accurately. Your role involves integrating various LLMs, including OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, and open\\-source models, into scalable applications, managing prompt engineering, and response optimization. You will own the full stack development process, from API design to frontend integration, ensuring seamless user experiences and system reliability. Monitoring system performance, latency, token usage, and cost metrics will be crucial, along with troubleshooting and fixing issues promptly. Collaboration with product and design teams to translate user requirements into technical solutions is vital, as is continuously exploring new models, frameworks, and techniques to improve our offerings. You will also contribute to maintaining high standards of code quality, documentation, and testing to ensure robust deployment of AI systems.
   

  

**Benefits**
 CambrianEdge.ai offers a competitive compensation package that includes salary, equity, and comprehensive benefits tailored to support your well\\-being and professional growth. As a remote\\-first organization, we provide flexibility to work from anywhere within the US, empowering you to create your ideal work environment. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects that have a tangible impact on businesses and industries worldwide. Our culture promotes continuous learning, innovation, and ownership, allowing you to shape your career trajectory while contributing to transformative AI solutions. Additionally, we support professional development through training, conferences, and collaborative knowledge\\-sharing initiatives, fostering a vibrant and inclusive workplace where diverse perspectives are valued and celebrated.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 CambrianEdge.ai is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We believe that a diverse team fosters creativity, innovation, and better problem\\-solving, and we strive to ensure that all qualified individuals have equal access to employment opportunities regardless of race, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We are dedicated to building a workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their best.

title: Sr Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Aptonet is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable software services to clients across various industries. With a focus on leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies, Aptonet specializes in cloud computing, API development, and enterprise system modernization. Our mission is to empower organizations to achieve digital transformation through tailored solutions that enhance operational efficiency, scalability, and security. Committed to fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment, Aptonet prides itself on attracting top talent and maintaining high standards of technical excellence and customer satisfaction.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our dynamic engineering team at Aptonet. This role is pivotal in designing, developing, and maintaining our internal actuarial cloud platform, which serves as a backbone for our global clients. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in cloud\\-first API development, legacy system support, and enterprise\\-scale solutions. You will work closely with actuaries, architects, and product stakeholders to build innovative cloud solutions that enhance our service offerings and streamline operational workflows. This position offers a unique opportunity to lead technical initiatives, mentor junior engineers, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our platform’s performance, security, and scalability.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate should have a minimum of 8\\+ years of professional experience in software development, with proven expertise in cloud\\-based systems and API platforms. A strong foundation in C\\# and .NET frameworks is essential, along with hands\\-on experience with AWS or Azure cloud services. Candidates should demonstrate proficiency in API development, containerization, and infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform. Additional skills in SQL, relational and NoSQL databases, and modern front\\-end frameworks like React are highly desirable. Certifications related to cloud technologies or software engineering are a plus, as is experience in the insurance or reinsurance domain. The candidate must possess excellent communication skills, a proactive mindset, and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, test, deploy, and support API\\-based applications with a cloud\\-first approach, ensuring high quality and scalability.
* Independently create end\\-to\\-end technical solutions from initial concept through to deployment and maintenance.
* Resolve complex technical challenges by applying sound engineering judgment and innovative problem\\-solving techniques.
* Support and enhance existing legacy systems while simultaneously building modern cloud\\-native solutions.
* Collaborate closely with business users, product owners, and cross\\-functional teams to gather requirements and deliver optimal solutions.
* Implement best practices including Test\\-Driven Development (TDD), clean coding principles, and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD).
* Mentor junior engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning.
* Continuously evaluate and improve system performance, security, and reliability to meet evolving business needs.


**Benefits**
 At Aptonet, we believe in supporting our employees’ professional growth and well\\-being. We offer competitive compensation packages aligned with industry standards, along with comprehensive health and wellness benefits. Our employees have access to ongoing training and certification opportunities to enhance their skills and career advancement. We promote a flexible work environment that encourages work\\-life balance, including options for remote working arrangements. Additionally, employees enjoy a collaborative and inclusive culture that values innovation, transparency, and mutual respect. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to work on impactful projects that shape the future of enterprise technology solutions.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Aptonet is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We believe diversity drives innovation and are dedicated to creating a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our collective success.
